name: Alocasia
_note: Repro for #101 — probe placement variance right after watering. Pre-watering reading was 3; user watered 2 cups; first post-watering reading landed in a dry pocket (2) and a second reading 5 minutes later in a wetter spot (6). The 2 is physically impossible (water can't make soil drier than 3) and should be rejected from smoothing. Timestamps are anchored to a fixed past date so the fixture is deterministic.
